items.name: Green Alien Gir Ushanka w/ Black Messy Hair
items.description:
🌟Dont forget to Like the Item🌟

Fun silly alien ushanka hair featuring a green cool alien-style ushanka paired with messy brown hair for a relaxed, alternative look. This ushanka hat with hair is perfect for alt outfits, casual avatars, cozy winter looks, and nostalgic roleplay. The messy brown hair adds a natural, laid-back vibe while the alien ushanka brings a playful, standout style. Great for aesthetic outfits, photos, and standing out in lobbies.

items.name: Flying Carpet of Books
items.description: Reading can take you places. Literally. Books version of the magic carpet; click to activate. Using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or the arrow keys to control the direction it flies. Click again to hop off.

items.name: Nonmagic Carpet
items.description: This carpet used to be magic.  You bought it at a rug shop from a crying salesman because the situation was really awkward... Still it's cool to think that princesses and tigers used to fly around on this thing you just walk on when you enter the foyer.
